tasks.label: Research: Plan
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research plan --suite harmeme_to_fhm_smoke

tasks.label: Research: Preflight
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research preflight --strict

tasks.label: Research: Smoke Dry Run
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research run --suite harmeme_to_fhm_smoke --dry-run --output-root result/research_smoke

tasks.label: Research: Smoke
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research run --suite harmeme_to_fhm_smoke --device cpu --limit 20 --output-root result/research_smoke_cpu

tasks.label: Research: Aggregate Results
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research aggregate

tasks.label: Research: Update Dashboard
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research dashboard

tasks.label: Paper: Export Results
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research paper-export

tasks.label: Paper: Refresh Results and Build All
tasks.command: conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research aggregate && conda run -n meme_cikm python scripts/run.py research paper-export && make -C latex draft
